div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Data moved to cloud
+ API delivery
+ structured JSON
+ webhook streaming

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
+ SHA-256 cryptographic hash
+ Merkle tree membership proof
+ Bitcoin Ordinal inscription
+ Risk score from Chirp
+ Alert associations from detection
+ Case linkage from Fox
+ Canonical UUID identity
+ Namespace resolution (RaaS)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
+ Structured API format
+ Real-time webhook delivery
+ Cross-location aggregation
+ Employee identity linking

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
gLog Record
---
canary_uuid (PK)
merchant_uuid
location_uuid
employee_uuid
timestamp (ISO-8601)
line_items[]
payment{}
sha256_hash
merkle_leaf_index
merkle_batch_id
merkle_proof_path[]
inscription_id
block_height
tx_id
risk_score
alert_ids[]
case_id (if escalated)

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Properties
---
Immutable (SHA-256 sealed)
Bitcoin-anchored (Ordinals)
Merkle-provable (O(log n))
Independently verifiable
Cross-merchant visible
Receipts outlive the company
Every register = network node
No trust required

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Cloud POS Record
---
merchant_id
location_id
timestamp (ISO-8601)
line_items[]
payment{}
employee_id
refund_references
api_version

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Properties
---
Webhook-delivered (JSON)
Cloud-hosted (AWS/GCP)
Still mutable (provider controls)
No cryptographic proof
Chargebacks = word vs. word
Provider can alter history

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
tLog Record
---
store_id
register_id
timestamp
sku | qty | price
tender_type
cashier_id
void_flag

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Properties
---
Sequential flat file
Mutable (edits invisible)
Proprietary format
Locked on POS terminal
No cryptographic integrity
No cross-store visibility

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Global Trust Network
---
Every cash register = a node
Every transaction = a proof
Every receipt = permanent
The gLog: Geoffrey's Log
30 years from tLog to here
